calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-01-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:45am
Judge Pro Tem Marc Seidenfeld, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record: Cause called for Small Claims Appeals. (This action is related to #028384: both cases are heard concurrently.)
Respondent Yin Chang Feng appears in pro per; appeallant cindy pan appears in pro per. Parties and witnesses are sworn. Pauline Lo, appears to assist Ms. Feng with translation and presenting her case. (Ms. Lo is Ms. Feng's case worker and she reads from a statement dictated by Ms. Feng.)
Lily Phan, daughter of Cindy Pan, presents Ms. Pan's case in the narrative.
10:02am
Matter is submitted, no new evidence is admitted or retained.
